[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A split-screen image shows a person wearing over-ear headphones in the top-left corner beside a close-up anime-style character with long dark hair filling the rest of the frame.

Main Subject:
In the top-left, a person with short dark hair and a dark shirt wears large black over-ear headphones and looks toward the camera with a slight smile. On the right, an anime-style face shows long straight dark hair framing the head, closed or lowered eyes with red lashes, a small mouth with a faint smile, and a black choker-like collar at the base of the neck; there is also a dark, cape-like garment covering the shoulders.

Setting:
The top-left appears to be indoors with a plain, softly colored background, while the rest of the image is a stylized digital/illustrated close-up with no real-world setting visible.

Visual Details:
The person’s face is lit from the front with a neutral, warm tone, and the background behind them is muted. The anime character occupies most of the image, with a pale face, dark hair, and a high-contrast, clean line-art style; lighting is bright and flat across the illustrated face, and the hair casts dark shapes around the cheeks and jaw area.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image combines a live video reaction window and an anime-style close-up portrait. The person in the corner wears headphones, while the larger part shows a character with long dark hair and a calm, faint smile.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text present in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- No extractable text detected.

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only images/graphics (a person and anime-style character). There is no visible, legible UI text, captions, or labels to extract.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
